headline: Assessing Dell Technologies (DELL) Valuation After Its Recent Share Price Surge
summary: What Dell Technologies stock’s recent move means for investors Dell Technologies (DELL) has attracted fresh attention after a recent share price move, with the stock up about 21% over the past week and roughly 25% over the past month. Over the past 3 months, the share price shows a mid single digit gain, while the 1 year total return of about 60% and multi year figures suggest investors have already seen substantial price and dividend outcomes. See our latest analysis for Dell...

headline: Dell Earnings Highlight AI Server Growth Capital Returns And Edge Expansion
summary: Dell Technologies (NYSE:DELL) reported record earnings and revenue, supported by strong demand for AI servers. The company announced a larger dividend and an expanded share buyback program. Dell introduced the XR9700 rugged edge server for telecom and 5G deployments. The company highlighted recent AI focused acquisitions and new AI partnerships across its portfolio. Dell sits at the intersection of PCs, data center infrastructure, storage, and services, so any shift toward AI hardware and...
